typical_filters: No specific filters required for equipment master data access. Filter by HERST for manufacturer-specific analysis or EQART='CPE' for customer premises equipment.
common_traps: GEWRK work center codes lack description mappings in the static layer per Code Tables DAR. INBDT installation dates show 40% nulls indicating incomplete installation tracking for some equipment.
typical_use_cases: Equipment lifecycle tracking, CPE asset inventory, manufacturer performance analysis, maintenance work center allocation.
reference_sql:
SELECT eq.EQUNR, eq.EQART, eq.HERST, eq.TYPBZ, eq.GEWRK
FROM raw_sap.equi eq
WHERE eq.HERST = 'Huawei Technologies'

typical_filters: Filter by WERKS for plant-specific inventory analysis; exclude zero stock with LABST > 0 for active inventory positions
common_traps: MARD shows stock per storage location; aggregating by material without considering storage locations may double-count. INSME and SPEME are typically zero in this dataset indicating no quality inspection or blocked stock
typical_use_cases: Available inventory analysis by plant and storage location, stock level monitoring for MRP planning, warehouse capacity utilization tracking
reference_sql:
SELECT md.MATNR, md.WERKS, md.LGORT, md.LABST
  FROM raw_sap.mard AS md
 WHERE md.LABST > 0
   AND md.WERKS = 'HT10'
natural_thresholds_json: {"LABST": {"rationale": "quartile-based on distribution assumed unimodal (MVP heuristic per \u00a725.9(e); KDE-based local-minima detection deferred as post-launch enhancement for multimodal distributions).", "thresholds": [95.5, 1004.5, 12943.75]}}

typical_filters: Filter by fiscal year MJAHR for period analysis; filter by user USNAM for user-specific activity reports
common_traps: XBLNR is 91% empty strings which appear as non-null values; distinguish between empty string and actual external references. Material document headers without line items in MSEG indicate system inconsistencies.
typical_use_cases: Material document header analysis, goods receipt timing tracking, user activity monitoring, external reference reconciliation
reference_sql:
SELECT h.MBLNR, h.BUDAT, h.USNAM, h.XBLNR
FROM raw_sap.mkpf h
WHERE h.MJAHR = '2025'
  AND h.XBLNR != ''

typical_filters: Filter `BWART IN ('101', '201', '161', '122')` for primary movement types; most analysis focuses on BWART='201' which represents 84.47% of transactions (goods issue for cost center/deployment).
common_traps: MSEG contains all goods movement events across multiple business processes; aggregating quantities without BWART filtering can double-count inventory. Serial number field SERNP is fully populated but requires joining with EQUI for equipment lifecycle tracking.
typical_use_cases: CPE equipment deployment tracking via movement type 201, goods receipt analysis via type 101, vendor return processing via type 122, and customer return handling via type 161.
reference_sql:
SELECT m.MBLNR, m.BWART, m.MATNR, m.MENGE, m.DMBTR
FROM raw_sap.mseg m
WHERE m.BWART IN ('101', '201', '161', '122')
AND m.MJAHR >= '2024'
natural_thresholds_json: {"DMBTR": {"rationale": "quartile-based on distribution assumed unimodal (MVP heuristic per \u00a725.9(e); KDE-based local-minima detection deferred as post-launch enhancement for multimodal distributions).", "thresholds": [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]}, "MENGE": {"rationale": "quartile-based on distribution assumed unimodal (MVP heuristic per \u00a725.9(e); KDE-based local-minima detection deferred as post-launch enhancement for multimodal distributions).", "thresholds": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}

typical_filters: Filter by OBTYP='E' for equipment objects (100% of current data)
common_traps: All records currently have OBTYP='E' and OBZAE=1, indicating a uniform object type distribution. TASER field definition is incomplete in data dictionary which may cause interpretation issues.
typical_use_cases: Equipment-to-serial number cross-referencing, asset hierarchy navigation, material-equipment linkage for CPE deployment tracking
reference_sql:
SELECT obj.EQUNR, obj.SERNR, obj.MATNR
  FROM raw_sap.objk AS obj
 WHERE obj.OBTYP = 'E'
   AND obj.OBZAE = 1

typical_filters: Filter by APPR_STATUS='02' for approved entries (75% of records); exclude entries with null TOL_AMT for monetary analysis
common_traps: TOL_AMT is null in 54% of records limiting financial analysis scope. EBELN/EBELP are null in 20% of records breaking PO-level joins. SGTXT text field is sparse (37% null) for narrative context
typical_use_cases: Approval workflow tracking, tolerance variance analysis, approver workload distribution, and invoice exception monitoring
reference_sql:
SELECT zal.APPROVAL_ID, zal.APPR_STATUS, zal.TOL_AMT, zrc.description
FROM raw_sap.zmm_approval_log zal
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('zmm_reason_codes') }} zrc ON zal.REASON_CODE = zrc.reason_code
WHERE zal.APPR_STATUS = '02' AND zal.TOL_AMT IS NOT NULL
natural_thresholds_json: {"TOL_AMT": {"rationale": "quartile-based on distribution assumed unimodal (MVP heuristic per \u00a725.9(e); KDE-based local-minima detection deferred as post-launch enhancement for multimodal distributions).", "thresholds": [544.02, 1069.25, 1561.8]}}
